series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence seeking information, direction, assistance, or referral to appropriate entities, or correspondence of a general nature between DODD and other state agencies, county boards of DD, clients, guardians, individuals, companies etc. Correspondence with legislators and their offices on behalf of their constituents. Includes plans, follow up, and details.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: resolution or response. ; Paper: scanned and saved electronically
